parameters.command:
cat << 'EOF' > generate_presentation.py
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN

prs = Presentation()
prs.slide_width = Inches(13.333)
prs.slide_height = Inches(7.5)

# Configure elements from JSON output
slides_data = {{ JSON.stringify($json.choices[0].message.content) }}

# Render pptx process loop
for slide_data in slides_data:
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    # Add slide rendering logic based on template

prs.save('dynamic_generated_presentation.pptx')
EOF
python generate_presentation.py

parameters.subject: Your Custom Generated Slide Deck
parameters.message: Hi, please find your custom generated marketing slide deck attached.
